title: coronilla orientalis subsp. orientalis
intro: Coronilla orientalis subsp. orientalis, also known as the Greek valerian or yellow crown, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Coronilla orientalis subsp. orientalis include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Coronilla orientalis subsp. orientalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and address various health issues.
